AllowedHeaders.description: Specify the response headers allowed for cross-origin requests.

items.description: Specify the response headers allowed for cross-origin requests. Constraints: You can enter multiple headers, one per line, separated by line breaks. If there are no special requirements, it is recommended to set to *, which allows all.

AllowedMethods.description: Specify the allowed methods for cross-origin requests.

items.description: Specify the allowed methods for cross-origin requests. You can specify one or more, including PUT, GET, POST, DELETE, HEAD.

AllowedOrigins.description: Specify the allowed origins for cross-origin requests.

items.description: Specify the allowed origins for cross-origin requests. Constraints: Use IP address or domain name format; port numbers are allowed. Must include https:// or http://. You can enter multiple origins, one per line, separated by line breaks. Only one wildcard * is allowed per line.

ExposeHeaders.description: Specify additional headers to include in the CORS response to provide extra information to the client.

items.description: Specify additional headers to include in the CORS response to provide extra information to the client. Constraints: You can enter multiple headers, one per line, separated by line breaks. Wildcard * is not allowed.

MaxAgeSeconds.description: Specify the cache duration for OPTIONS request responses on the client side, in seconds. Default is 3600.

ResponseVary.description: Whether to return the Vary: Origin header

description: Set CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) rules for the bucket.
